zh.lifeSummary: 當Emich III von Leiningen於大約1125年出生時，他的父親Emich Von Leiningen41歲，母親Demundis von Lauremburg23歲。他與Elisabeth von Eberstein結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1187年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emich III von Leiningen于大约1125年出生时，他的父亲Emich Von Leiningen41岁，母亲Demundis von Lauremburg23岁。他与Elisabeth von Eberstein结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1187年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Leiningen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Leiningen.

nameMeanings.name: Emich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Emich III von Leiningen was born about 1125, his father, Emich Von Leiningen, was 41 and his mother, Demundis von Lauremburg, was 23. He married Elisabeth von Eberstein. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1187, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emich III von Leiningen est né environ 1125, son père, Emich Von Leiningen, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Demundis von Lauremburg, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Eberstein. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1187, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emich III von Leiningen um 1125 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Emich Von Leiningen 41 und seine Mutter Demundis von Lauremburg 23. Er hat Elisabeth von Eberstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1187 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emich III von Leiningen è nato il circa 1125, il suo padre, Emich Von Leiningen, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Demundis von Lauremburg, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Eberstein. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1187, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emich III von Leiningenが約1125年に生まれた時，父Emich Von Leiningenは41歳，母Demundis von Lauremburgは23歳であった。Elisabeth von Ebersteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emich III von Leiningen(이)가 대략 1125년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Emich Von Leiningen(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Demundis von Lauremburg(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Elisabeth von Eberstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emich III von Leiningen nasceu aproximadamente 1125, seu pai, Emich Von Leiningen, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Demundis von Lauremburg, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Eberstein. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1187, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emich III von Leiningen родился около 1125 г., его отцу по имени Emich Von Leiningen было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Demundis von Lauremburg, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Eberstein. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1187 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emich III von Leiningen nació aproximadamente 1125, su papá, Emich Von Leiningen, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Demundis von Lauremburg, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Eberstein. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1187, a la edad de 63 años.
